title: Chicken & Pancetta Tortelloni With Red Romesco & Oregano
summary: A homemade red romesco sauce and La Famiglia Rana Chicken & Pancetta Tortelloni make a dream team in this speedy recipe. It's about texture as much as taste

ingredients.label: 1 x 200g Jar Of Roast Red Peppers, Drained
ingredients.name: Roasted Red Pepper

ingredients.label: A Few Sprigs of Fresh Oregano (5g)
ingredients.name: Fresh Oregano

ingredients.label: 250g La Famiglia Rana Chicken & Pancetta Tortelloni
ingredients.name: Tortelloni

ingredients.label: A Very Small Handful of Parsley (10g)
ingredients.name: Parsley

ingredients.label: A Small Handful of Fresh Basil (20g)
ingredients.name: Basil

method.description: Start by peeling and finely dicing the onion and the garlic.

In a medium frying pan, add the peeled and finely diced onion with 1 tbsp of olive oil and fry on a medium heat for 5-8 mins until soft and a little caramelised. Add the finely chopped garlic and fry for a further minute until just cooked and fragrant.

Drain the jarred peppers and add them to a high speed blender with the caramelised onions and garlic, fresh oregano, tomato purée, the remaining 2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil and salt and pepper and blitz until you have a smooth sauce.

Bring a large pot of water to the boil, then add in the La Famiglia Rana Chicken & Pancetta Tortellini to cook for just 2 mins before draining. Add the romesco into the pan with the cooked pasta and give it a toss so it is all coated.
Portion into bowls and serve with the herbs and the Parmesan and a little more salt and pepper to finish.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
